name: my-code-agent
description: 基于 PI 架构的自定义 Code Agent — 桌面端为主，CLI 为辅

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:routes && npm run test:frontend && node test/css-vars.mjs
scripts.test:unit: tsx --test test/prompts.test.mjs test/tree.test.mjs test/explorer-service.test.mjs test/tools-input-validation.test.mjs test/ui-state-store.test.mjs test/usage-index.test.mjs test/mcp-config.test.mjs test/mcp-trust-store.test.mjs test/mcp-client.test.mjs test/mcp-client-service.test.mjs test/tab-store.test.mjs test/search-replace.test.mjs test/agent-memory.test.mjs
scripts.test:routes: tsx --test test/routes.test.mjs test/sessions.test.mjs test/workspace-session.test.mjs test/typescript-route.test.mjs test/chat-sse.test.mjs test/attachments.test.mjs test/tool-trace.test.mjs test/trace-sse-lifecycle.test.mjs test/block-persist.test.mjs
scripts.test:frontend: tsx --test test/render-snapshot.test.mjs test/chat-ui-state.test.mjs test/session-ui.test.mjs test/workspace-ui.test.mjs test/app-tabs.test.mjs test/file-restore.test.mjs test/problems-bottom-bar.test.mjs test/search-pane.test.mjs
scripts.test:build: node scripts/compile-frontend-ts.mjs && npm run build:vite && node test/smoke.mjs
